languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"

languages.text: "Мудрейший, если когда-либо понадобится присмотреть за вашими чертогами, я с радостью подсоблю! Вы же не откажетесь провести мне экскурсию при случае?"
"O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"

"O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"

languages.text: «Oh, sabio entre los sabios, si alguna vez necesita que alguien vigile sus aposentos, ¡estaré encantada de hacerlo! No le importaría enseñármelos, ¿verdad?».
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"

traits.locale_text: «Oh, sabio entre los sabios, si alguna vez necesita que alguien vigile sus aposentos, ¡estaré encantada de hacerlo! No le importaría enseñármelos, ¿verdad?».

languages.text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、もしお部屋を見張る者が入り用になったときは、喜んでお引き受けしますわ！ ちょっとご案内してくださっても、かまいませんでしょう？」
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"

traits.locale_text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、もしお部屋を見張る者が入り用になったときは、喜んでお引き受けしますわ！ ちょっとご案内してくださっても、かまいませんでしょう？」

languages.text: “世间最睿智之人啊，要是你哪天要人帮忙照看实验室，我非常乐意效劳！所以，你不介意带我参观一下吧？”
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"

traits.locale_text: “世间最睿智之人啊，要是你哪天要人帮忙照看实验室，我非常乐意效劳！所以，你不介意带我参观一下吧？”

languages.text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, falls Ihr jemanden braucht, der Eure Gemächer bewacht, wäre ich mit Freuden dazu bereit! Ihr wollt sie mir nicht zufällig zeigen, oder?"
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, falls Ihr jemanden braucht, der Eure Gemächer bewacht, wäre ich mit Freuden dazu bereit! Ihr wollt sie mir nicht zufällig zeigen, oder?"

languages.text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, si vous avez besoin de quelqu'un pour garder un œil sur vos quartiers, je serais ravie de m'en charger ! Vous voulez bien me faire visiter ? »
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"

traits.locale_text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, si vous avez besoin de quelqu'un pour garder un œil sur vos quartiers, je serais ravie de m'en charger ! Vous voulez bien me faire visiter ? »

languages.text: "Ey bilgelerin bilgesi, olur da odalarına göz kulak olacak birine ihtiyaç duyarsan seve seve yardımcı olurum! Bana orayı gezdirmekten çekinmezsin, değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, if you ever need someone to keep an eye on your chambers, I'd be only too pleased to oblige! You wouldn't mind giving me a tour, would you?"
